scripts.phase1:all: npm run sanitize:scan && npm run sanitize:assets && npm run verify:no-legacy-cdn-images && npm run verify:no-dead-static-refs && npm run verify:assets && npm run verify:hdr && npm run verify:header-slot && npm run verify:protected-auth && npm run verify:loading-shell && npm run verify:membership-billing && npm run verify:settings-membership-ui && npm run verify:settings-delete && npm run verify:scroll-dot && npm run verify:catalog && npm run verify:catalog-editorial && npm run verify:catalog-seasons && npm run verify:home-featured && npm run verify:entry-catalog-linkage && npm run verify:entry-runtime-readiness && npm run verify:protected-assets && npm run verify:favorites && npm run verify:notifications && npm run verify:submission-tracker && npm run verify:submission-lookup && npm run verify:submit-ui && npm run verify:pressroom-ui && npm run verify:newsletter && npm run verify:error-support && npm run verify:call && npm run verify:buttons && npm run verify:dexnotes && npm run verify:heading-zwnj && npm run verify:mobile-viewport && npm run verify:hover-motion && npm run verify:polls
scripts.hdr:all: npm run hdr:manifest && npm run hdr:inject && npm run styles:sync && npm run verify:hdr
scripts.catalog:all: npm run catalog:extract && npm run catalog:build && npm run catalog:sync && npm run catalog:verify && npm run catalog:editorial:verify && npm run catalog:seasons:verify && npm run verify:home-featured
scripts.call:all: npm run call:extract && npm run call:build && npm run call:sync && npm run call:verify
scripts.polls:all: npm run polls:build && npm run polls:verify
scripts.dexnotes:all: npm run dexnotes:migrate && npm run dexnotes:build && npm run dexnotes:sync && npm run dexnotes:verify
scripts.test:net:prod: node -e "if(!process.env.BASE_URL){console.error('BASE_URL is required');process.exit(1)}" && playwright test tests/network-purity-prod.spec.ts
scripts.sanitize:all: npm run vendor:auth0 && npm run phase1:all && npm run test:protected-assets && npm run test:asset-ref && npm run test:recording-index-token && npm run test:dex-workspace-config && npm run test:download-tree-plot-model && npm run test:input-guard-paste && npm run test:entry-runtime-audit && npm run test:entry-catalog-linkage && npm run test:entry-link-command && npm run test:update && npm run test:dex-catalog-cli && npm run test:dex-home-featured-cli && npm run test:dex-notes-cli && npm run test:net && npm run test:polls-routing && npm run test:achievements-loading && npm run test:favorites-lookup && npm run test:catalog-season-unannounced && npm run test:messages-notifications && npm run test:submission-tracker && npm run test:submission-lookup && npm run test:submit-samples-ux && npm run test:pressroom-ux && npm run test:newsletter && npm run test:error-support && npm run test:heading-zwnj && npm run test:hover-motion && npm run test:profile-mobile-shell && npm run test:visual
scripts.phase2:all: npm run repo:discover && npm run phase2:inventory && npm run phase2:states && npm run phase2:tokens
scripts.ref:capture: node scripts/reference_screenshots.mjs && node scripts/reference_style_inventory.mjs && node scripts/reference_style_states.mjs
scripts.baseline:from-ref: npm run ref:capture && npm run ref:tokens && npm run ref:visual
